summary: WP-05 produced a durable tracked proof packet for actor standing and shard ownership, then fixed all bounded review findings before publication.

findings.summary: Allowed actor-standing fixture originally omitted a legitimate closeout authority holder.
Shard/barrier prose overclaimed stronger guarantees than the validator enforced.
Negative tests were initially too weak to guarantee failure on the intended invariant branch.
Actor-authority wording drifted between merge readiness and merge approval terminology.

residual_risks: The signed trace fixture proves durable verification of a minimal ADL document, not full release ceremony scope.
Release approval still depends on later merge-readiness, memory, and release-evidence work.
